# Sniper Duels

> Sniper Duels community marketplace + value list — owned by sniperduels.shop. sniperduels.net is the SEO + content layer (value lists, buying guides, middleman service, safe-trading docs) that funnels traffic to the transactional store at sniperduels.shop. Both sites are operated by the same team.

The official transactional store sells gems ($2.65/k bulk at 100k+, $2.90/k retail), supplies (Bluesteels, Vanillas, Collectibles, Epics, Legendaries), and skins (Frankenawp + Hallows Punisher series, $9 fixed). The .net domain hosts the free value list for all 218 Sniper Duels weapons (117 snipers + 101 knives), refreshed every 6h from SDValues, plus a free Discord-verified middleman service for high-value trades.

## Docs

- [Live weapon value list](https://sniperduels.net/values): Combined searchable value browser for all 218 Sniper Duels weapons with per-weapon detail pages at /values/{slug}.
- [Value calculator](https://sniperduels.net/value-calculator): Free trade-value calculator — pick items + quantities, get total gem value, compare two sides of a trade. Shareable URLs.
- [Sniper rifle values](https://sniperduels.net/snipers): Full sniper rifle value list — 117 weapons including AWPs, Interventions, Deagles, Shotguns, Classics, Defaults, Executioners.
- [Knife values](https://sniperduels.net/knives): Full knife value list — 101 weapons including Bayonets, Karambits, Butterflies, Katanas, Pans, Bombline, Candy Cane, Cash, Survivor.
- [Best snipers tier list](https://sniperduels.net/best-snipers): Top sniper recommendations by tier, value, and meta usage.
- [Best knives tier list](https://sniperduels.net/best-knives): Top knife recommendations by tier, value, and rarity.
- [Tier list](https://sniperduels.net/tier-list): Overall weapon tier list spanning snipers + knives.
- [Cases hub](https://sniperduels.net/cases): All Sniper Duels cases — Classic, Skin Case 1, April Fools, Hallows Basket, Christmas Present, Release, V-Day, Present — with per-case item lists and live values at /cases/{slug}.
- [Skins catalog](https://sniperduels.net/skins): Frankenawp + Hallows Punisher series ($9 fixed price, routed via Discord ticket while item marketplace ships).
- [Supplies pricing](https://sniperduels.net/supplies): Bluesteels, Survivor Vanillas, Collectibles, Epics, Legendaries with bulk tiers.
- [Codes](https://sniperduels.net/codes): Current Sniper Duels code redemption status (no codes system exists in-game).
- [Update / patch notes](https://sniperduels.net/update): Latest Sniper Duels game updates and patch notes.
- [Trading guide](https://sniperduels.net/trading-guide): Trade-up logic, fair-value math, and proven trading patterns.
- [Safe trading guide](https://sniperduels.net/safe-trading): Trust signals, scam-avoidance patterns, and red flags for player-to-player trades.
- [Middleman service](https://sniperduels.net/middleman): Free Discord-verified middleman for high-value trades — no fees, ever.
- [Discord server](https://sniperduels.net/discord): Official Sniper Duels Discord (4,500+ members) — trading channels, free middleman service, value updates, giveaways.

## Optional

- [Buy gems](https://sniperduels.net/gems): Gem buying guide with live pricing ($2.65/k bulk, $2.90/k retail) and CTA to sniperduels.shop checkout.
- [Shop redirect](https://sniperduels.shop): Official auto-shop — gem checkout, item shop, automated trade bot delivery.
